sources.title: Open Windows | Crime Mystery Thriller Movie | Full Kidnap Mystery Movie
sources.description:
Open Windows | Crime Mystery Thriller Movie | Full Kidnap Mystery Movie

Nick’s a lucky guy - he’s having dinner with Jill Goddard, the hottest actress on earth. Then a guy named Chord calls: dinner’s been canceled. And it’s Jill’s fault. But Chord’s got something better…

2014. Stars: Sasha Grey, Elijah Wood, Neil Maskell

metadata.Plot: An actress named Jill refuses to have dinner with Nick, a fan who won a date with her in an Internet contest. In return, a guy named Chord, posing as Jill's campaign manager, helps Nick to follow in the footsteps of the actress from his own computer. Nick starts a game in which he realizes that he is only a puppet into the maniacal plans devised by Chord, to hunt down the star.
metadata.Actors: Sasha Grey, Elijah Wood, Neil Maskell
